title: Fix webui module rendering (invisible ModuleNode)
description:
**Problem:** Module nodes are invisible on the graph canvas. System and Container nodes render correctly.

**Root cause:** ModuleNode unconditionally applies the 'settling' class (app.js:585), triggering recon-settle animation with animation-fill-mode: both on SVG <g> elements. This strands module nodes at opacity issues.

**Fix:** Drop the unconditional settling class or gate it on real state transitions.

**Acceptance:**
- All 23 nodes visible including modules
- tests/graph_explorer.rs asserts /api/graph returns module nodes
- dogfood + clippy/fmt/test green

title: Epic: orchestrator-agnostic CAIRN with pluggable storage + reference adapters
description: GH #95. Three-layer architecture: semantic core (CAIRN), pluggable storage (filesystem default, optional Beads), pluggable orchestrator adapter (Gas City reference + future adapters). Tracks sub-issues covering integration contract, StateBackend trait, stable JSON, Beads backend, Gas City pack, OpenSpec retirement.

title: Map CAIRN_PATH_GITIGNORED to a remediation action
description: remediate_json dropped CAIRN_PATH_GITIGNORED in its _ => {} arm, so cairn remediate reported 'good shape' while cairn lint warned. Mapped it to a node-specific fix_gitignored_path action (priority 2) with a test in tests/gitignore_lint.rs. Fixed this session via the Cairn Dev Loop.
close_reason: Fixed and committed this session (fix(remediate) commit); test added, gates green.

title: Next phase: webui repair + MAS orchestration hardening
description:
**Epic tracking the next development phase for cairn.**

**Context:** PR #127 merged MAS orchestration foundations (health, remediate, dogfood, scan caching). All quality gates pass and cairn health reports clean.

**Priorities:**
- P0: cairn-s9r — Fix webui module rendering (invisible ModuleNode)
- P1: cairn-42m — MAS orchestration: human renderers + node-specific remediate + cairn next driver
- P2: cairn-95q — Webui server hardening: cache invalidation, timeouts, CI smoke tests

**Exit criteria:**
- All nodes render correctly in webui
- cairn health / remediate / next work without --json
- cairn scan reports zero findings on dev
- CI covers webui server smoke tests

title: MAS orchestration: human renderers + node-specific remediate + cairn next driver
description:
**Problem:** health and remediate error without --json, remediate emits generic placeholders, no loop-driver command exists, ~10 finding codes unmapped.

**Gaps:**
- cairn health / remediate require --json (no human renderer)
- remediate emits generic cairn summarise <node-id> instead of real node IDs
- No cairn next driver to print single next action + clean flag
- ~10 finding codes unmapped (CAIRN_ORDER_CYCLE, CH001, CAIRN_PATH_GITIGNORED, CAIRN_CONTRACT_WRONG_NODE...)

**Fix:**
- Add human renderers for health/remediate
- Make remediate emit node-specific actions using Finding.node
- Add cairn next command printing single next action + clean flag
- Map all unmapped finding codes to actions

**Acceptance:**
- cairn health / remediate / next work without --json
- remediate emits real node IDs
- every emitted finding code maps to an action
- following actions provably reaches clean=true
- dogfood gate asserts clean

title: Housekeeping: mark 13 obsolete tasks and tick 7 done-but-unchecked in phase files
description: Quick cleanup pass across active openspec/changes/ phase task files. Mark 13 tasks obsolete due to cflx retirement (decision #105): phase 7.6 tasks 1.5-1.7, 3.3-3.7, 4.6-4.7; phase 10 tasks 1.3-1.7. Tick 7 done-but-unchecked: phase 7.6 tasks 4.4, 4.5; phase 9 task 1.4; phase 10 tasks 1.1, 1.2. Add a note referencing GH #105 for obsoleted items.

title: [decision] CAIRN does not ship its own orchestrator
description: GH #105. Durable architectural decision: CAIRN does not own an orchestrator. Integration via contract (#96) + reference adapters under adapters/. Cairness as scoped is retired. cflx retired in favour of CAIRN accept/archive primitives under any external runner.

title: [orch-agnostic] Stable JSON output and documented exit codes
description: GH #98. Audit every cairn command. Define JSON schema per command. Ensure all commands support --json. Exit codes documented in --help and docs/integration-contract.md. Schema-validated round-trip tests.

title: [openspec-retire] Change-lifecycle skills + cairn change new
description: GH #102. Skills: cairn-propose, cairn-explore, cairn-apply, cairn-archive (drop into .claude/skills/). CLI: cairn change new <name> scaffolds meta/changes/<name>/ with proposal.md, design.md, tasks.md templates using ADDED/MODIFIED/REMOVED/RENAMED delta syntax. Spec s4 amendment: workflow is external (skills + formulas), not kernel.

title: [orch-agnostic] Pluggable StateBackend trait with filesystem default
description: GH #97. ArtefactStore trait in CAIRN core for artefact state (status, claim, edges). Default impl: filesystem (preserves current behaviour). Backend selection via cairn.blueprint config. Trait-level test suite shared by all impls.
close_reason: StateBackend enum with filesystem default and config-based selection implemented, tested, and pushed.

title: [orch-agnostic] Integration contract for external orchestrators
description: GH #96. Define and document the CAIRN integration contract: stable CLI surface, JSON schema per command, exit-code taxonomy (0=clean, 1=advisory, 2=blocking, 3=fatal), event envelope, subscription primitive. New doc at docs/integration-contract.md.
close_reason: Integration contract written at docs/integration-contract.md in commit 8d7cef3

title: handlers.rs (764 lines) exceeds the 500-line module size gate with no allow directive
description: scripts/check-file-sizes.sh caps src/*.rs at 500 lines unless the first non-blank line is '// cairn:allow-large-module reason: ...'. src/query_api/handlers.rs is 764 lines and its first line is a different // Reason comment, so the gate would fail if run. Either split handlers.rs (query handlers are independent functions) or add a justified allow directive. Found while looking for a home for a unit test.

title: hooks_architecture tests require working git commit (fail under commit-signing sandboxes)
description: tests/hooks_architecture.rs git_commit() helper ignores git exit status. In environments that enforce commit signing (signing server can 400 on ad-hoc temp repos), the initial commit fails, so the architecture gate has no prior blueprint in HEAD and correctly passes, making test_architecture_gate_fires_on_module_add_without_decision and test_architecture_gate_fires_on_reassign_across_containers fail. Not a product bug. Options: assert git_commit succeeded and skip with a clear message when signing is unavailable, or seed the prior snapshot without git. Pre-existing on dev HEAD.
close_reason: Fixed: git_init sets commit.gpgsign=false; full suite green (33/33 binaries).

title: Webui server hardening: cache invalidation, timeouts, CI smoke tests
description:
**Problem:** Webui server caches ScanResult only by blueprint mtime, missing source/contract/config changes. No write timeout, no Cache-Control, single-threaded, zero server.rs tests.

**Fix:**
- Broader cache invalidation (source edits, contract changes, config changes)
- Add write timeout
- Add Cache-Control headers
- Add CI smoke step asserting 200 on /api/status, /api/graph, /api/lint

**Acceptance:**
- Two rapid /api/status calls are fast (<100ms second call)
- Edits to source/contracts reflected without server restart
- CI asserts 200 on graph/status/lint endpoints

title: JSON status/severity contradiction in check no-blueprint path
description: The check command's JSON envelope returns status:error with FindingSeverity::Info when no blueprint exists (src/cli/mod.rs:157-167). This contradicts the convention where status:error indicates blocking findings. Downstream JSON consumers checking status === error will treat a missing blueprint as a failure, despite the Info severity signaling it is non-blocking. Either the status should be ok or the severity should be Error.

title: Reconciler dedup bug: duplicate findings for multi-reconciler files
description: cairn-lsp.rs was reported 22 times (once per reconciler) when it appeared as orphaned. The blueprint fix silenced the symptom, but the underlying issue remains: the reconciler pipeline does not deduplicate findings that share the same code, node, and message across multiple reconciler passes. Need to add a dedup step in the finding aggregation path.

title: Phase 8 Summariser: CLI commands, backend impls, draft lifecycle
description: Umbrella for ~15 unchecked tasks from openspec/changes/phase-8-summariser/tasks.md. Includes: local command backend impl (task 1.4), hosted API adapter boundary (task 1.5), fake test backend (task 1.6), prompt input assembly from map facts/contracts/findings (task 2.1), draft status transitions (task 2.3), draft generation/accept/edit/discard resolution actions (tasks 3.1-3.6), CLI commands cairn summarise/drafts/draft show/accept (tasks 4.1-4.4), tests for prompt inputs and byte limits (task 2.4). Foundation exists in src/summariser/ but CLI wiring and backend completions remain.

title: Phase 7.7 UX: empty-state components, findings rollup, prose-nudge banners
description: Umbrella for ~30 unchecked tasks from openspec/changes/phase-7.7-ux-foundation/tasks.md. Includes: empty-state component and rendering (tasks 5.1-5.8), findings rollup panel with severity buckets and filters (tasks 6.1-6.6), prose-nudge banners with copy lookup and substitution (tasks 7.1-7.6), voice section and review checklist in design-system docs (tasks 3.1-3.3), integration tests for cairn check (tasks 4.4-4.5), orphaned-file Info severity producer (tasks 1.3, 1.5), spec deltas (tasks 8.1-8.3). Partially overlaps with cairn-zw5 (copy.toml).
notes: Wave 1 COMPLETE. All 5 PRs merged: #120 (empty-state CSS), #121 (orphan Info), #122 (findings rollup), #123 (prose-nudge banner), #124 (test unstubbing). 273 tests pass, 43 ignored. Remaining 5 cflx_planned stubs: 1 clean-map CTA (needs feature), 4 integrity overlay (future phase). Issues filed: cairn-fok, cairn-ir7, cairn-g4i, cairn-r2m.

title: [gas-city] adapters/gascity/ reference pack
description: GH #100. Gas City reference adapter pack: pack.toml, formulas (cairn-reconcile, cairn-lint, cairn-drift-gate, cairn-onboard), prompts, README with install steps. Single copy/symlink makes cairn formulas available in any Gas City city.

title: [openspec-retire] OpenSpec retirement: import-openspec migration
description: GH #104. cairn import-openspec one-shot: walks openspec/changes/, recreates active phases under meta/changes/, copies archive. Conventions migrate to per-module rules blocks. Registries become graph queries. Update CLAUDE.md and AGENTS.md. Blocked by #102 and #103.

title: [beads] BeadsStore StateBackend + schema enforcement
description: GH #99. Beads as state backend behind the ArtefactStore trait. BeadsStore impl talks to bd via subprocess. Config: [storage] provider = beads in cairn.blueprint. Schema per artefact type. Edge mapping: provenance->relates_to, authority->needs, hinge->parent.
close_reason: BeadsStateBackend implemented with bd kv subprocess, tested, quality gates pass, pushed to origin.

title: [openspec-retire] Tasks-as-beads inside a change
description: GH #103. When [storage] provider = beads: cairn change new creates an epic bead for the change, tasks are child beads with parent and needs edges. cairn change tasks lists ready tasks. cairn change apply claims and walks tasks. Filesystem fallback: tasks.md as today.

title: Suggest engine: cross-cutting edge suggester
description: Phase 9 section 5, getcairn C8.c. Implement a cross-cutting edge suggester that consumes bounded code samples and structural candidates from brownfield discovery plus summariser output. Emits suggested edges into openspec/changes/<change>/suggested-edges.json using the schema from phase 7.6. Sets triage_state to pending. Interacts with CC002 accept-time gate.

title: Refactor: extract suggested_edges module from provenance
description: Adopt the experiment/openspec-swarm branch's module split: move suggested-edges queue types and logic from src/provenance/queue.rs into a new src/suggested_edges/ module, leaving src/provenance/ focused on trace sidecars only. Traces are immutable records, edge queues are mutable triage workflows with different lifecycles, so they belong in separate modules. Keep all of dev's implementation quality: CC002 validation gate, atomic writes (PID+nanos), dedicated QueueError enum, typed TraceStage enum, exported version constants. Add EdgeProvenance struct from experiment (links edges back to trace phases). Mechanical refactor: move files, update ~12 import paths across cli/hooks/query_api/tests, update cairn.blueprint. Zero logic changes needed. Reference: cairn-openspecdev src/suggested_edges/ and src/provenance/ on experiment/openspec-swarm branch.

title: Brownfield: add discovery/init/refine layer from experiment branch
description: Borrow the experiment/openspec-swarm branch's brownfield discovery pipeline as a new layer beneath the existing onboard command. The experiment's approach (discovery.rs, init.rs, refine.rs) provides cold-start filesystem scanning that works without an existing blueprint, complementing dev's heuristics/onboard which require a computed graph. The natural pipeline is: init --from-code (day 0 bootstrap) -> onboard (orphan classification with coupling scores) -> refine (periodic re-discovery). Implementation: port discovery/init/refine from experiment, wire cairn init --from-code and cairn refine CLI commands, keep dev's coupling-score heuristics as a refinement pass on discovered candidates. Reference: cairn-openspecdev src/brownfield/ on experiment/openspec-swarm branch.

title: Split src/cli/commands.rs into per-command submodules
Add valid file-size allow directive to query_api/change_queries.rs
Wire decisions into the blueprint provenance graph (epic)
description: cairn ingests decisions only when a node declares a decisions pointer. The repo has meta/decisions/ in an older schema (type/node/affects) that cairn's loader (id/nodes/status/date) skips. Provenance coverage is all-or-nothing: the first declared decision makes every uncovered leaf node raise CAIRN_PROVENANCE_NO_DECISION. To adopt: migrate meta/decisions to the id/nodes schema, declare decisions pointers, and write covering decisions for all ~22 leaf nodes. High value (cairn's core), repo-wide, should be its own milestone.

title: cairn context summary omits Info-severity finding count
description: The context command renders 'Findings: X errors, Y warnings' (src/cli/render.rs:440-449) but does not include Info-severity findings in the summary. Now that orphaned-file findings are Info severity, they are invisible in context output. Add an info count to the summary line.

title: cairn scan as CI/agent verification gate
description: Now that cairn self-checks clean (zero findings on itself), cairn scan can serve as a verification gate alongside cargo test in CI and agent workflows. Add a cairn scan --strict mode that exits non-zero on any Error or Warning finding, suitable for pre-commit hooks and CI pipelines. Document usage pattern for CLAUDE.md and CI config.

title: Phase 9 Brownfield: documentation, MCP registry, fixture tests
description: Residual documentation and test tasks from phase 9 not covered by existing beads issues (cairn-1yk, cairn-9ya, cairn-9p9, cairn-aq1, cairn-5bu). Includes: review workflow docs (task 9.1), confidence/evidence documentation (task 9.2), MCP registry entries for brownfield commands (task 9.3), limitations documentation (task 9.5), fixture tests for simple/nested/mixed-language/low-confidence repos (task 1.5), summariser integration bounded inputs and tests (tasks 2.1-2.4).

title: Phase 7.6: wire islands CLI command and neighbourhood --include-orphans flag
description: Two tasks from phase 7.6 that are partially implemented but not wired to CLI: (1) cairn islands command (islands() query exists in src/map/query.rs but no CLI dispatch), (2) cairn neighbourhood --include-orphans flag (parameter exists in query.rs but not wired to CLI args). Also: graph-explorer verb-edge rendering update (task 4.8) and queue snapshot test (task 2.11).

title: Phase 10 Distribution: plugin packaging, extension API, release docs
description: Umbrella for ~8 unchecked tasks from openspec/changes/phase-10-distribution/tasks.md. Includes: plugin/agent packaging and Claude Code integration docs (tasks 2.1-2.3), extension API and fixture reconciler (tasks 3.1-3.3), release packaging with command reference, example project, and tests (tasks 4.1-4.4). cairn-lsp stub exists but full LSP deferred. No beads coverage existed for phase 10 before this issue.

title: [gas-city] SSE event consumer spike
description: GH #101. Spike: subscribe to Gas City SSE stream, print typed events, demonstrate reactive cairn lint on bead lifecycle events. Decide: ship / defer / drop after prototype.

title: Templated authoring: contract templates in cairn.blueprint
description: Phase 9 section 7, getcairn C15. Define [templates] config surface in cairn.blueprint for contract templates with name, glob/tag matchers, body schema. Resolve matching templates against stub contracts during init and refine. Fallback to built-in stub when no template matches.

title: Interview runner: multi-round elicitation for brownfield onboarding
description: Phase 9 section 6, getcairn C1.b. Extend cflx-proposal (or cairn-propose) skill with multi-round elicitation mode. Persist session state inside change directory. Support --resume for picking up partial sessions. Write final transcript to research/genesis.md. Tests for start, resume, abandonment, transcript shape.

title: Externalized UI copy via copy.toml
description: Port the copy.toml pattern from experiment/openspec-swarm branch. Centralizes user-facing strings (empty states, findings messages) in docs/design-system/copy.toml with a src/cli/copy.rs lookup helper. Needs re-implementation against dev's CLI structure (not a direct cherry-pick). Reference: cairn-openspecdev:/docs/design-system/copy.toml and src/cli/copy.rs on experiment/openspec-swarm branch.

title: Decision-attached obligations on brownfield-generated decisions
description: Phase 9 section 8, conditional on C4.b. If decision artefacts grow an obligations field, populate it on AI-suggested decisions from brownfield generator. Surface in change directory for human triage. If schema unchanged, record no-op in design.md.
